The Hong Kong Be Water Act of 2019

https://www.hawley.senate.gov/sites/default/files/2019-10/Hong-Kong-Be-Water-Act-One-Pager.pdf

The legislation does the following:
1. Condemns the government of the People’s Republic of China for violating its obligations under the Sino-British Joint Declaration of 1984 and the Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People’s Republic of China.
2. Calls for Global Magnitsky sanctions against the Hong Kong and Chinese government officials – and those operating on behalf of or in cooperation with the same – responsible for suppressing or facilitating the suppression of Hongkongers’ freedoms of speech, association, assembly, procession, and demonstration.
3. Calls for freezing the assets of Chinese nationals and state-owned enterprises who have contributed to the suppression of Hongkongers’ freedoms of speech, association, assembly, procession, and demonstration.

陳雲：政治市。陳雲下午教路。美中可能不會在明年年初之前達成第一階段貿易協議。香港人最不想見到的中美爛局來了。
路透社援引貿易專家及接近白宮人士在星期二透露，美中推遲原本在十二月初左右簽訂的初步貿易協議，主因是北京施壓要求美方更廣泛降低關稅，而特朗普政府也提出更多要求反制，例如知識產權保護及在中外合資企業廢除強制性質的外國技術轉移。 下一個日期是十二月十五日，美國徵收1,560億美元的生效日期。
中美對付對方的策略，請看我今早帖文的分析。特朗普用盡任期的時間，習近平用盡美元的流入，在最惡劣的時候達成初步貿易協定。特朗普任期明年完結，中共明年美元乾塘。Last moment deal，即是bad deal for both. 因為Last moment deal之後來的，是無盡的反悔與罵戰。香港人，要非常小心。千萬不要聽信泛民的呼籲出去搞陣地堡壘、攬炒罷工之類來給警察送頭。差人借機會濫權濫捕，將香港的司法搞壞，嚇走投資者及駐港工作人員，將香港的就業數字和消費者信心變得惡劣。
香港是中美貿易交換的地方，經濟前景要觀望到2020年初，才有眉目。
在香港的壞年代開始的時候，大家更要勤奮工作，創業興家，並且投放金錢在公共利益的事業上，令社會重燃希望。

The Hong Kong Be Water Act of 2019

https://www.hawley.senate.gov/sites/default/files/2019-10/Hong-Kong-Be-Water-Act-One-Pager.pdf

The legislation does the following:
1. Condemns the government of the People’s Republic of China for violating its obligations under the Sino-British Joint Declaration of 1984 and the Basic Law of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People’s Republic of China.
2. Calls for Global Magnitsky sanctions against the Hong Kong and Chinese government officials – and those operating on behalf of or in cooperation with the same – responsible for suppressing or facilitating the suppression of Hongkongers’ freedoms of speech, association, assembly, procession, and demonstration.
3. Calls for freezing the assets of Chinese nationals and state-owned enterprises who have contributed to the suppression of Hongkongers’ freedoms of speech, association, assembly, procession, and demonstration.
